title: Disable Elytra Outside The End
description: Disables elytra or fireworks boosting outside the End dimension (customizable)
body:
# Disable Elytra Outside The End

The mod does what it says in the name (+ more)

## Features
- Use `/deote` command to modify config in-game (or GUI if playing with LAN)
- Change working dimensions via `dimensionList` parameter
- Change allowed flight items via `itemList` parameter (with Curios compat)
- Configurable messages when flight or firework boosting is prevented
- Prevent player without this mod from joining to server


TODO:
- [ ] Spigot/Paper plugin (why not)

> I'm not planning to backport mod to <1.21.1, since networking got changed and I don't want to get into it.
> 
> _But source code is open, so you can do it by yourself._

It's not recommended to use v1.x, since it's buggy and terrible.
